title: Playground agents config
description: Agents the playground control-plane can chat with and inspect. Loaded and validated by lib/agents.ts.

id.description: URL-safe identifier; also the proxy path segment (/api/agents/<id>). For local targets it should match the app directory under apps/*.

enabled.description: Disabled agents are listed but not proxied.

port.description: Resolves to http://127.0.0.1:<port> (an `eve dev`/`eve start` server on this machine).

url.description: Base URL of a deployed eve agent (origin where /eve/v1/* is mounted).

authHeaderEnv.description: Name of a server-side env var holding the full Authorization header value (e.g. "Bearer xyz") the proxy attaches. Convention: PLAYGROUND_<SCREAMING_SNAKE_ID>_AUTH.
